assertions.description: document.characterSet is exposed; this is the spec-defined view onto the resolved encoding the parser used.
document.inputEncoding is exposed as the legacy alias for characterSet.
TextDecoder still decodes 'iso-2022-jp' explicitly — only auto-detection is removed.
A text/html byte stream containing ISO-2022-JP escape bytes but no explicit charset is not auto-detected as ISO-2022-JP.
assertions.test: (async()=>{const bytes=Uint8Array.from([60,33,100,111,99,116,121,112,101,32,104,116,109,108,62,60,98,111,100,121,62,27,36,66,36,51,36,115,36,75,36,65,36,79,27,40,66,60,47,98,111,100,121,62]);const load=(type)=>new Promise((resolve,reject)=>{const f=document.createElement('iframe');f.style.cssText='position:absolute;left:-9999px;width:1px;height:1px';const url=URL.createObjectURL(new Blob([bytes],{type}));f.onload=()=>setTimeout(()=>{try{const d=f.contentDocument;const result={cs:d.characterSet||'',text:d.body?.textContent||''};URL.revokeObjectURL(url);f.remove();resolve(result);}catch(e){reject(e);}},20);f.src=url;document.body.append(f);});const r=await load('text/html');return r.cs.toLowerCase()!=='iso-2022-jp'&&r.text.charCodeAt(0)===27;})()

assertions.description: TextDecoder() with no args defaults to utf-8 — the encoding the parser falls back to without a declaration.
An explicit text/html;charset=iso-2022-jp declaration still decodes the same byte stream as ISO-2022-JP.
assertions.test: (async()=>{const bytes=Uint8Array.from([60,33,100,111,99,116,121,112,101,32,104,116,109,108,62,60,98,111,100,121,62,27,36,66,36,51,36,115,36,75,36,65,36,79,27,40,66,60,47,98,111,100,121,62]);const load=(type)=>new Promise((resolve,reject)=>{const f=document.createElement('iframe');f.style.cssText='position:absolute;left:-9999px;width:1px;height:1px';const url=URL.createObjectURL(new Blob([bytes],{type}));f.onload=()=>setTimeout(()=>{try{const d=f.contentDocument;const result={cs:d.characterSet||'',text:d.body?.textContent||''};URL.revokeObjectURL(url);f.remove();resolve(result);}catch(e){reject(e);}},20);f.src=url;document.body.append(f);});const r=await load('text/html;charset=iso-2022-jp');return r.cs.toLowerCase()==='iso-2022-jp'&&r.text==='こんにちは';})()
